app.name: Lyrictor
app.one_liner: A Final Cut Pro-inspired web editor for creating lyric animations synced to audio tracks.

screens.name: Editor Workspace
screens.purpose: Primary interface for synchronizing lyrics with audio using a multi-track timeline and visual editing tools.
primary_actions: Drag lyric segments onto timeline tracks
Import audio (local file or stream URL)
Paste and edit full lyrics in reference panel
Switch between Custom and Vertical Scrolled modes

rust_commands.name: save_project
rust_commands.purpose: Persist project state to cloud (Firebase) or browser localStorage based on user preference.

mvp_plan: week 1: Add localStorage persistence with unsaved changes warning
week 1: Build dual-mode layout engine (Custom + Vertical Scrolled)
week 1: Enable drag-and-drop of lyric segments onto timeline tracks
week 1: Implement waveform-based audio player with seek controls
acceptance_tests: In Vertical Scrolled mode, lyrics automatically scroll in sync with playback like Apple Music.
User can create a new project, import an audio file, paste lyrics, and save to localStorage without losing data on refresh.
